msg: Happy Monthsarry, Tin! Howard is so lucky to have you. Chuchu loves you both! ♡
It's lunchtime, Tin! Don't forget to eat something delicious. Howard is cheering for you! 💖
Time to rest, Tin. You did an amazing job today. Sweet dreams! 🌙
Merry Christmas, Tin! Howard wants to make sure your day is filled with magic! 🎄
